name: kilo-agentmemory-bridge
description: Kilo/OpenCode server plugin bridge for agentmemory.

secret.description: Bearer token for agentmemory, when configured

tokenBudget.description: Token budget for recalled session context

compactionBudget.description: Token budget for recalled compaction context

timeoutMs.description: Default agentmemory request timeout in milliseconds

shortTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for best-effort observation requests in milliseconds

injectTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for context and enrichment requests in milliseconds

summarizeTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for stop summarization requests in milliseconds

sessionEndTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for terminal session end requests in milliseconds

consolidationTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for optional consolidation requests in milliseconds

injectSessionContext.description: Inject recalled session context into the system prompt

injectToolContext.description: Fetch pre-tool enrichment context for file/search tools

summarizeOnStop.description: Call summarize when Kilo emits session.idle

consolidationEnabled.description: Run optional consolidation endpoints on terminal session end

memoryBridgeSync.description: Run optional Claude memory bridge sync during compaction and session end

endSessionOnIdle.description: Treat session.idle as terminal session end for legacy behavior
